disclaimer.title: Product disclaimer
disclaimer.short: This app is a companion and support tool, not a medical product or device. It does not provide medical or psychological diagnosis, treatment, or clinical assessment and is not a substitute for professional medical or mental health care. In an emergency, call your local emergency number or go to the emergency room.

welcome.title: Welcome to Postpartum AI Copilot
welcome.subtitle: You're not alone at 3am
welcome.description: We're here to support you through your postpartum journey with:
welcome.step2Subtitle: This helps us provide personalized support
welcome.step3Note1: This app provides general information, not medical diagnosis
welcome.step3Note2: Always consult healthcare professionals for medical concerns
welcome.step3Note3: Your data is private and secure
welcome.step3Note4: You can update your information anytime in settings

dashboard.insightText: Based on your tracking, everything looks normal for this stage.

checkin.title: Emotional Check-in
checkin.subtitle: How are you feeling today? This is a safe space to check in with yourself.
checkin.share: Anything else you'd like to share? (optional)
checkin.disclaimerNonClinical: For support and reflection only. This is not a clinical or medical assessment.
checkin.safetyNote: Remember: This is not a substitute for professional mental health care. If you're experiencing thoughts of self-harm or harm to your baby, please contact emergency services immediately.

settings.title: Settings

settings.privacyNote: Your data is stored locally and securely. This app provides general information only, not medical diagnosis. Always consult healthcare professionals for medical concerns.

export.tipText: Exported data includes all your tracking entries. You can share this with your healthcare provider.

welcome.title: Welcome to Postpartum AI Copilot
welcome.description: Your AI companion for the postpartum journey
welcome.missionText: We provide empathetic, evidence-based support to help new mothers navigate the postpartum period with confidence and peace of mind.

chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
chat.description: Get instant answers to your questions
chat.step1: Click the Chat tab in the navigation
chat.step2: Type your question about postpartum care, baby care, or your wellbeing
chat.step4: AI will flag any red flags and recommend consulting healthcare providers when needed
chat.tipText: The AI learns from your tracking data to provide more personalized advice.

tracking.title: Smart Tracking
tracking.description: Track feeding, sleep, diapers, and more
tracking.aiAnalysis: The AI analyzes your data to identify patterns and provide insights about what's normal for your baby's age.

nightMode.title: Crisis Support Mode
nightMode.useCase1: You're overwhelmed and need immediate guidance
nightMode.useCase2: Baby won't stop crying and you need quick help
nightMode.useCase3: You need concise, actionable advice fast
nightMode.emergencyText: For medical emergencies, always call emergency services immediately.

checkin.title: Emotional Check-ins
checkin.benefit1: Early detection of postpartum depression or anxiety
checkin.note: Your mental health matters. It's okay to ask for help.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.feeding: Feeding reminders based on your patterns
notifications.custom: Custom reminders for appointments or tasks
notifications.smart: Notifications are smart - they learn from your usage patterns and adjust timing accordingly.

family.title: Family Sharing
family.privacy: All data sharing is secure and you control who can see what.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.step2Desc: Ask your first question to the AI assistant
